## Readiness Checklist

- [ ] Repo exploration completed.
- [ ] External research completed.
- [ ] Upstream/course research completed or not applicable.
- [ ] Grill decisions completed.
- [ ] Novelty reach included.
- [ ] Deep modules identified.
- [ ] Testing decisions included.
- [ ] `ready-for-agent` is appropriate.
